name: Middle Eastern Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the top 1/4 from the pita pocket and reserve for another use.
2. Open the pita pocket and spread hummus on one side.
3. Spoon tabouli into the pita.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: crumbled feta cheese, romaine lettuce, chopped tomato, alfalfa sprouts, and chopped Greek olives.
5. Drizzle the salad with lemon dill dressing.
6. Serve alone or multiply for more portions. Broiled pieces of pita bread are excellent for dipping extra hummus.
